text: OpenAI o1 (2024) represents a paradigm shift to reasoning-time compute scaling: the model "thinks" through problems using hidden chain-of-thought, dramatically improving math, coding, and scientific reasoning capabilities.

DeepSeek-R1 (2025) achieved o1-level reasoning using pure reinforcement learning without supervised fine-tuning on reasoning data, demonstrating that reasoning emerges from RL with simple reward functions.

Scaling test-time compute (Snell et al. 2024, DeepMind, ICLR 2025) proved that increasing inference computation (e.g., best-of-N, beam search) can be more effective than scaling model parameters for improving LLM performance.
